ddls:
CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., datasheet, certificate) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "revision" INTEGER /* Revision number of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_configurations" (
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the configuration belongs to */,
  "configuration_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("configuration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the revision belongs to */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  "revision_description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, engineer, sales) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the permission */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the role (e.g., view_product, edit_product) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_product_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level granted to the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was performed */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date the trend was recorded */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend (e.g., sales, revenue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)
